edge_hypothesis: Bollinger Band breakouts capture volatility expansion from consolidation. Prior Bollinger specs produced 0 trades because the default volume_ratio_min=1.0 was too restrictive — crypto breakouts often begin on below-average volume and accelerate. By lowering the volume threshold to 0.5 (or removing it entirely), we allow the price breakout itself to be the primary signal. The Bollinger squeeze (narrow bandwidth) naturally precedes expansion moves in crypto, and close > upper band is a non-repainting, bar-close-safe breakout signal. ADX context helps: low ADX (<20) confirms the pre-breakout consolidation, while the breakout itself pushes ADX higher. Regime assumption: ranging-to-trending transition. Invalidation: if >60% of breakout signals reverse within 2 bars, the breakout signal is noise in current crypto microstructure.

variants.name: bollinger_low_volume_breakout
variants.description: Bollinger breakout with relaxed volume gate (0.5x average). Prior specs got 0 trades at 1.0x volume. This variant accepts breakouts on below-average volume, relying on the price break above/below bands as sufficient signal. Wide 3.5:1 R:R to capture full expansion moves. Targets the ranging-to-trending transition that Bollinger naturally detects.
entry_long: Close breaks above BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger band).
Volume > 0.5x 20-period volume moving average (relaxed from 1.0x default).
entry_short: Close breaks below BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger band).
Volume > 0.5x 20-period volume moving average (relaxed from 1.0x default).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when close crosses back below BBM_20_2.0 (middle band / 20-period SMA).
Exit short when close crosses back above BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: False breakout — close re-enters bands within 1-2 bars
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: bollinger_no_volume_gate
variants.description: Bollinger breakout with NO volume confirmation. Tests whether volume gating is what killed all prior Bollinger specs (0 trades). Pure price breakout above/below bands. Compensates for potential lower quality signals with tight stop (0.8x ATR) and wide TP (3:1 R:R). If this produces trades while volume-gated versions don't, volume gating is the culprit.
entry_long: Close breaks above BBU_20_2.0 (upper Bollinger band).
No volume gate — pure price breakout signal.
entry_short: Close breaks below BBL_20_2.0 (lower Bollinger band).
No volume gate — pure price breakout signal.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when close crosses back below BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit short when close crosses back above BBM_20_2.0 (middle band).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.4x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (0.8x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Without volume confirmation, false breakouts increase
risk_rules: Stop loss at 0.8x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.4x ATR_14 from entry.
